Managed Analytics Services
Managed analytics services imply outsourcing data analysis to a service provider to eliminate the need for developing and managing a proprietary analytics solution. In data analytics since 1989, ScienceSoft helps companies obtain quick and flexible analytics results out of their raw data by setting up and supporting the infrastructure, conducting data management and data analysis.

Data Areas We Cover with Our Services
Financials
Fraud detection, financial performance analysis, cost and budget analysis, credit scoring, risk management.
Customers
Customer acquisition, satisfaction, and preferences analysis, marketing campaigns optimization, customer segmentation.
Sales
Sales performance, pricing strategies optimization, sales forecasting.
Brands and products
Brands and products performance, product quality control and production optimization, customer sentiment, competitor analysis, pricing strategies optimization.
Supply chain
Analysis of procurement, supplier performance and risks, monitoring of inventory levels, orders and logistics analysis.
Assets
Real-time asset monitoring
and tracking, OEE (overall equipment effectiveness) and predictive maintenance, assets life cycle analysis.
HR
Analysis of employee performance, benefits, compensation, and training data, optimization of talent acquisition and retention strategies.

Our Selected Managed Analytics Projects
Managed Analytics Success Story
With the managed analytics service by ScienceSoft, a management consultancy conducted strategic market analysis and acquired actionable insights from the 10-year history of external data.
Project details
Managed Analytics Success Story
ScienceSoft’s managed analytics services allowed a German metal parts manufacturer with $800 mln revenue to conduct comprehensive data analysis within the set time budget. We enabled the company to decide on focus categories and consequently streamline their business.
Project details
Managed Analytics – Frequently Asked Questions
Will our data be safe?
To ensure complete data security, we conduct 24/7 in-house security monitoring and store data within highly secure facilities (both on-premises and cloud).
How can people ‘from outside’ understand our company’s peculiarities?
In the course of cooperation, ScienceSoft’s analysts obtain information from available data sources as well as from interviews with your employees, which allows them to achieve data completeness and its correct interpretation.
In what form will we get analytics insights?
We provide analytics results in the following forms:
Pre-built reports and dashboards for different business users delivered on a predefined schedule or triggered by certain events.
Interactive reports and configurable dashboards with the possibility to drill down, pivot and filter data for deeper analysis.
A self-service analytics platform with secure role-based access.
How soon will we get the required analytics?
It usually takes ScienceSoft:
1 day
– to deliver the first online dashboard consisting of a few charts and tables.
2-5 days
– to deliver a comprehensive analytical report*.
4 hours - 2 days
– to create a new online dashboard*.
2 hours - 1 day
– to deliver changes in an existing report or a dashboard*.
* The delivery time may vary in accordance with the report/dashboard complexity, data cleansing procedures, the urgency and SLA.
What does the price of managed analytics include?
The monthly fee covers:
Data management activities (ETL, data quality assurance, etc.).
Providing access to self-service analytics tools.
Regular tuning of ML models.
Regular reports.
Alerting of the agreed type.
Ad hoc reports and analysis (agreed number and complexity).
Any extra activities and services are priced on the T&M or fixed (for one-time activities) basis. If you need an estimate,
we will gladly provide it
.
